en.name: AK-545 "Workshop Predator"
en.description: Originally a Sureshot Armament Group AK-545 carbine, a modern 5.45x39 platform. Tony took this standard carbine into his workshop and reworked the internals for full-auto operation, tuned the recoil, and reinforced the gas system. What came out is a compact but vicious full-auto carbine, built for operators who don’t settle for standard rifles. Tony says it’s small, fast, and unforgiving — just like he likes them.
